postCreateCommand.venv-setup: cd /workspaces/tds-sentinel-mvp-v3-2-0/backend && (test -d .venv || /usr/bin/python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -q && echo '✅ venv listo'
postCreateCommand.env-setup: cd /workspaces/tds-sentinel-mvp-v3-2-0/backend && (test -f .env || (cp .env.example .env && /usr/bin/python3 -c "import secrets; content=open('.env').read().replace('REEMPLAZA_CON_UN_VALOR_SECRETO_SEGURO', secrets.token_hex(32)); open('.env','w').write(content)")) && echo '✅ .env listo'
postCreateCommand.flutter-deps: cd /workspaces/tds-sentinel-mvp-v3-2-0/mobile/sentinel_mobile && flutter pub get && echo '✅ Flutter deps listos'
